---
title: "lookup_country"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `lookup_country()`

Lookup Country IDs

## Usage

```r
lookup_country(country_name, silent = getOption("flixpatrol.silent", FALSE))
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `country_name` | Character vector. The name(s) of countries to lookup (e.g., "United States", "France"). |
| `silent` | Logical. If 'FALSE' (default), prints success messages using 'cli'. |

## Value

A named character vector of country IDs.

## Description

Translates country names into FlixPatrol internal country IDs.

## Details

This function queries the '/countries' endpoint using exact matching. It is
vectorized via 'purrr::map_chr', meaning you can pass a single country name
or a vector of names. It will return the matching ID for each name provided.
